title: Two Skills Miss Steps You Always Do Manually

workflow_patterns.title: Planning the Whole Project Before Starting
workflow_patterns.description: You ask the agent to build something, and it spends time making a detailed plan before writing any code. It explores folders and writes out every step first.

workflow_patterns.title: Creating Many Files at Once
workflow_patterns.description: The agent creates multiple style and code files in batches, following the layout from the plan. Each file handles colors, layout, or animations separately.

workflow_patterns.title: Preview, Feedback, and Fix Rounds
workflow_patterns.description: The agent starts the site locally, takes a screenshot, you review it and point out problems (wrong images, broken buttons), then the agent fixes and re-checks.

workflow_patterns.title: Searching for Images Online
workflow_patterns.description: The agent uses a helper to search the web for image URLs, then puts those URLs into the site's code files.

evolutions.description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces. Adds style file organization, Unsplash image strategy, and a pre-ship checklist. Trigger: 'build a static site', 'design the UI'.

edits.new_string: ## Style File Organization for Static Sites When building static HTML/CSS/JS sites, split styles into five files by purpose: 1. **variables.css** — All shared values: colors, spacing, fonts, shadows 2. **base.css** — Default body styles, text sizes, scrollbar look 3. **layout.css** — Header, grid for cards, footer, screen size adjustments 4. **components.css** — Cards, popups, search box, filter buttons, labels 5. **animations.css** — Entrance effects, hover changes, popup transitions Never put color or spacing values directly in other files. Always refer back to variables.css. ### Image Strategy Use curated image URLs from Unsplash instead of random placeholder services: - Format: `https://images.unsplash.com/photo-{id}?w=800&h=600&fit=crop` - Each image should match its content (food photos for recipes, etc.) - Add `loading="lazy"` to all `` elements - Show a shimmer animation while images load ### Before You Ship Checklist Before declaring a static site complete, verify: - [ ] Popup close works: X button, clicking outside, and Escape key - [ ] Search box filters content correctly - [ ] Filter buttons toggle and filter cards - [ ] Tab key moves focus logically through the page - [ ] Screen reader announcements on changing content

evolutions.rationale:
The skill lacks guidance on organizing style files.
- Missing checklist that would catch broken buttons
- No image strategy led to wrong placeholder images

evolutions.description: Visually review a running web app with Playwright. Adds console-error capture, responsive screenshots, and interaction tests. Trigger: 'review the site', 'visual check', 'take a screenshot'.

edits.new_string:
## Visual Review Steps for Static Sites

When checking a static site during development, follow these steps:

### Quick Start
```bash
python3 -m http.server 8080 &
```

### Take a Screenshot
```python
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright

with sync_playwright() as p:
    browser = p.chromium.launch()
    page = browser.new_page(viewport={'width': 1440, 'height': 900})
    page.goto('http://localhost:8080', wait_until='networkidle')
    page.wait_for_timeout(2000)  # Let images and animations finish
    page.screenshot(path='/tmp/site-review.png', full_page=True)
    browser.close()
```

### Check for Errors
Before taking the screenshot, listen for errors in the browser console:
```python
errors = []
page.on('console', lambda msg: errors.append(msg.text) if msg.type == 'error' else None)
```
Tell the user about any errors alongside the screenshot.

### Check Different Screen Sizes
Take screenshots at three widths to make sure the layout adjusts:
- Desktop: 1440x900
- Tablet: 768x1024
- Phone: 375x812

### Test That Buttons Work
After the visual check, quickly test key interactions:
```python
# Test popup open and close
page.click('.card:first-child')
assert page.is_visible('.modal')
page.keyboard.press('Escape')
assert not page.is_visible('.modal')

# Test search filtering
page.fill('.search', 'pancake')
assert page.locator('.card:visible').count() >= 1
```

evolutions.rationale:
The skill lacks a structured visual review process.
- Needs a screenshot template with error checking
- Missing button tests that would catch the popup bug
